default_generator.description: Which model builds new courses by default. 'local' uses your Ollama/qwen model (free, slower); 'codex' uses gurney-codex if it's enabled and authed (faster, spends your daily Codex budget). Codex falls back to local automatically if it's unavailable.

default_depth.description: How many modules and lessons a new course aims for. 'quick' is fastest to generate; 'deep' is the most thorough but takes the longest on local models.
